# Decision 0001: title

## Context

Describe the forces and constraints at the time of the decision.
Name the review, accepted RFC, or other contemporaneous evidence that proves a decision was actually made; do not manufacture a retroactive record from current code alone.

## Decision

State the chosen direction precisely.

## Alternatives considered

Describe credible alternatives and why they were not selected.

## Consequences

Record benefits, costs, risks, and follow-up obligations.

## Current authorities

Link the architecture, specifications, and reference that own current behavior.

## Supersession

Link a replacing decision when status becomes `superseded`.
